metadata.name: Catalog Policy Validation
metadata.description: Validate CX-0135 catalog requirements: exactly one CCMAPI asset per BPNL and mandatory usage policy constraints (UsagePurpose: cx.ccm.base:1, FrameworkAgreement: DataExchangeGovernance:1.0).

instructions.name: Required CCMAPI Usage Policy
Query catalog for CCMAPI assets and validate policy matches expected constraints
EDR authorization token must be obtained
Dataplane URL must be returned

metadata.name: Request Certificate
metadata.description: Request certificate via CCMAPI endpoint per CX-0135 v3.1.0. Validates full 7-field header envelope on response and requestStatus enum.

instructions.name: Required CCMAPI Usage Policy
Discover CCMAPI offers, negotiate with expected policy, and obtain EDR
Datasets must be returned
Asset ID must be returned
Negotiation ID must be returned
Transfer process ID must be returned
EDR token must be returned
Dataplane URL must be returned
Generate request message ID
POST certificate request to CCMAPI endpoint via data plane
Response status code must be 200
Header messageId must be a valid URN UUID
Header context must match request context
Header sentDateTime must be present
Header senderBpn must be a valid BPNL
Header receiverBpn must match consumer BPN
Header relatedMessageId must match request UUID
Header version must be 3.1.0
Content requestStatus must be valid enum value
Content documentId must be present
Export request ID for downstream tests
Export document ID for payload validation
Export dataplane URL for downstream tests
Export EDR token for downstream tests

metadata.name: Certificate Asset Validation
metadata.description: Verify the SUT publishes exactly one CCMAPI certificate asset in its EDC catalog and that the offered usage policy matches the CX-0135 v3.1.0 requirements (UsagePurpose: cx.ccm.base:1, FrameworkAgreement: DataExchangeGovernance:1.0) before any data exchange is attempted.

instructions.name: Required CCMAPI Usage Policy
Discover the CCMAPI certificate asset and obtain dataplane credentials
EDR token must be obtained for the certificate asset
Dataplane URL must be returned for the certificate asset

metadata.name: Validate Certificate Payload
metadata.description: Discover certificate Submodel asset in provider catalog via EDC, negotiate + pull via EDR, and validate against CX-0135 BusinessPartnerCertificate semantic model v3.1.0.

instructions.name: Required CCMAPI Usage Policy
Discover certificate Submodel asset and obtain dataplane credentials
EDR token must be obtained
Dataplane URL must be returned
Fetch certificate payload via data plane
Response status code must be 200
Response body must not be empty
Validate response against BusinessPartnerCertificate v3.1.0 schema
Certificate type must match expected value

metadata.name: Push Certificate
metadata.description: Test CX-0135 PUSH mechanism: push certificate to SUT and verify SUT sends a feedback callback with correct relatedMessageId and valid certificateStatus.

instructions.name: Expose mock endpoint for SUT feedback callback
Required CCMAPI Usage Policy
Discover CCMAPI notification endpoint and obtain dataplane credentials
Generate push message ID
Push certificate to SUT via data plane
Wait for SUT feedback callback with status acknowledgment

metadata.name: Available Notification
metadata.description: Test CX-0135 AVAILABLE notification: send availability notification to SUT and verify SUT subsequently pulls the certificate from TestLab.

instructions.name: Expose mock endpoint for SUT certificate pull request
Required CCMAPI Usage Policy
Discover CCMAPI notification endpoint and obtain dataplane credentials
Generate available notification message ID
Send certificate available notification to SUT
Wait for SUT to pull the certificate from TestLab

metadata.name: Send Feedback Notification
metadata.description: Send a CX-0135 CCMAPI status notification to the provider via EDC dataplane and await the provider's acknowledgment on a TestLab mock endpoint.

instructions.name: Expose mock endpoint for provider RECEIVE acknowledgment
Required CCMAPI Usage Policy
Find CCMAPI endpoint and obtain dataplane credentials
Generate feedback message ID
Send CX-0135 status notification to provider via dataplane
Wait for provider RECEIVE acknowledgment

metadata.name: Expose TestLab Asset
metadata.description: Tests the PULL scenario of CX-0135: TestLab exposes a certificate asset via its own connector, then sends an AVAILABLE notification to the SUT through the dataspace protocol (catalog, negotiate, transfer, dataplane). The SUT must then discover TestLab's catalog, negotiate, and pull the certificate data.

instructions.name: Register a CCMAPI-typed asset in TestLab's connector

with.name: TestLab CCMAPI Certificate Data
with.description: CX-0135 compliant certificate data endpoint hosted by TestLab

instructions.name: Create a usage policy that restricts access to the SUT's BPN
Bind the asset to the policy
Expose mock data endpoint that serves the full BusinessPartnerCertificate payload
Required CCMAPI Usage Policy
Discover the SUT's CCMAPI notification endpoint and obtain dataplane credentials
Generate unique message ID for the AVAILABLE notification
Send the AVAILABLE notification to the SUT via its dataplane
Wait for SUT to pull certificate data from TestLab

metadata.name: Error Handling
metadata.description: Verify CX-0135 error handling: Test 1 sends a request with an unknown certificate type expecting REJECTED with proper envelope. Test 2 sends a malformed body (missing header) expecting HTTP 500.

instructions.name: Required CCMAPI Usage Policy
Discover CCMAPI offer and obtain dataplane credentials
Generate message ID for rejected request
Send request with nonexistent certificate type — SUT must return REJECTED with proper CX-0135 header envelope
Send malformed request body without header field — SUT must return HTTP 500
